quests.name: Wardens' Isle
quests.description: Warden Halric and the isle's instructors teach you the foundations of survival, craft, combat and lore before you sail for the mainland of Eldermoor.
steps: Design your adventurer with Warden Halric and confirm your appearance.
Learn click-to-move, the camera and the interface tabs, then step outside.
Take a bronze axe from Forester Maeve and chop a tree for logs.
Use a tinderbox on your logs to light a fire.
Net raw shrimp at the pond with a small fishing net.
Cook the raw shrimp on your fire and pass through the survival gate.
Make bread dough with Cook Tobin's flour and water.
Hear Loremaster Edda explain the quest journal, then find the mine ladder.
Mine tin and copper ore with Pickmaster Doran's bronze pickaxe.
Smelt the ores into a bronze bar at the furnace.
Smith the bar into a bronze dagger at the anvil and climb out.
Wield the dagger, equip leather armour and slay a giant rat for Sergeant Vael.
Equip a shortbow and arrows and down a rat at range.
Open the bank with Teller Wynn and practise deposit and withdraw.
Talk to Steward Brann about account management and the poll booth.
Bury bones at the chapel altar with Brother Aldric for Prayer experience.
Take runes from Magus Sorrel and cast Wind Strike on the practice chicken.
Confirm departure with Warden Halric and sail to Eldermoor's mainland.
rewards: Bronze axe, tinderbox, fishing net, pickaxe and hammer starter tools

quests.name: Cook's Errand
quests.description: Galley-cook Persa at the Hartwell Keep docks needs a quick meal turned out for the harbourmaster's table. Fetch her ingredients, bake the bread and cook the catch before the bell tolls noon.
steps: Speak with Galley-cook Persa at the dockside galley.
Fill a bucket of water from the harbour well and bring it to Persa.
Collect a pot of flour from the keep's grain store.
Mix the flour and water into bread dough at Persa's table, then bake it into bread on her range.
Catch a raw shrimp from the harbour shallows and cook it on the same range.
Deliver the finished bread and cooked shrimp to Persa to complete the harbourmaster's table.
rewards: A sack of provisions (5 cooked shrimp and 2 bread)

quests.name: Goblin in the Cellar
quests.description: Innkeeper Roswell of the Hartwell Keep tavern swears something is rattling the ale casks in his cellar at night. Climb down, find out what it is, and put a stop to it.
steps: Speak with Innkeeper Roswell in the Hartwell Keep tavern.
Take the cellar key and lantern from Roswell's bar.
Climb down into the tavern cellar and light the lantern.
Defeat the goblin squatter, Grubnik, who has been raiding the ale casks.
Search the casks for Grubnik's stolen coin pouch.
Return to Roswell with the coin pouch to claim your reward.
rewards: A bronze sword, a wooden shield and 50 coins

quests.name: The Cook's Shortfall
quests.description: Master Cook Brindle of Hartwell Keep has burned the harvest-feast cake and is missing three ingredients. Gather them before the steward returns.
steps: Speak with Master Cook Brindle in the Hartwell Keep kitchen.
Fetch a pail of milk from the dairy cow in the keep pasture.
Gather a sheaf of grain and grind it to flour at the windmill.
Collect a fresh egg from the henhouse behind the stables.
Return all three ingredients to Brindle to save the feast.
rewards: Access to Brindle's range and assorted foodstuffs

quests.name: The Grellkin Menace
quests.description: Grellkin raiders from the Mirewood have been stealing from the village of Lownbrook. Sergeant Holt needs them driven back across the marsh.
steps: Report to Sergeant Holt at the Lownbrook palisade.
Recover the stolen armour crate from the Grellkin scouting camp.
Defeat the Grellkin warband leader, Snagrot, in the Mirewood clearing.
Bring Snagrot's banner back to Sergeant Holt as proof.
rewards: 250 Attack experience and a small coin purse

quests.name: Secrets of the Runestones
quests.description: Archivist Pell of the Pale Tower suspects the old runestones beneath Eldermoor still hum with power. Carry her sealed enquiry to the reclusive Rune Warden.
steps: Meet Archivist Pell in the Pale Tower library.
Deliver her sealed enquiry to the Rune Warden in the cliffside hermitage.
Receive the Warden's talisman and return it to Archivist Pell.
Witness the first runestone awaken under Pell's reading.
rewards: Access to the Runecrafting altar network
An air talisman and starter rune essence

quests.name: The Feud of the Vinemoors
quests.description: Two rival vineyard houses, Corwell and Ashvale, have feuded for a generation, yet young Ilsa Corwell and Tomas Ashvale are secretly betrothed. Help them be together before the harvest tears the valley apart.
steps: Hear Tomas Ashvale's plea outside the Ashvale gate.
Carry a written message to Ilsa Corwell on her balcony.
Seek the herbalist Maither in the willow grove for a sleeping draught.
Deliver the draught to Ilsa so she may slip away unseen.
Reunite the lovers and broker an uneasy truce between the houses.
rewards: A modest coin reward and a Vinemoor signet

quests.name: Tides of the Saltmarsh
quests.description: The fishing hamlet of Saltmarsh is drowning under unnatural tides. Uncover the sunken shrine offshore and bind the tide-spirit before the village is lost.
steps: Investigate the rising tides with Harbourmaster Quenn.
Repair the old skiff and row out to the sunken shrine.
Dive the flooded shrine and recover the three tide-sigils.
Restore the sigils to the shrine pedestals in the correct order.
Confront and bind the tide-spirit Maelgra to calm the waters.
